title: System Prompt editor
summary: Paste the clinician prompt. The platform safety preface and technical constraints are appended automatically.
promptPlaceholder: Paste the role, interview workflow, restrictions, output format, and referral criteria…
rememberSession: Remember the prompt for this tab session only
previewWarning: This preview does not contain the API Key, but it does contain the complete clinician prompt.
errorEmpty: The System Prompt cannot be empty.
errorTooShort: The System Prompt is too short. Add the role, workflow, and restrictions.
errorTooLong: The System Prompt exceeds the allowed length.
errorCredentialDetected: The prompt appears to contain an API key, token, or password. Remove it first.
errorFileTooLarge: The prompt file is too large.
errorImport: The prompt file could not be read.
